name: N Srinivasan
description: Former BCCI President and owner of India Cements (CSK).

name: Gurunath Meiyappan
description: Former CSK Team Principal, banned for betting.

name: Raj Kundra
description: Former Rajasthan Royals co-owner, banned for betting.

name: Justice Lodha
description: Headed the Lodha Committee which reformed the BCCI.

name: Justice Mudgal
description: Headed the Mudgal probe into the 2013 fixing scandal.

name: Supreme Court of India
description: The highest judicial court in India, intervened in IPL governance.

name: BCCI
description: The Board of Control for Cricket in India.

name: India Cements
description: The cement company that owned the Chennai Super Kings.

name: Chennai Super Kings
description: One of the most successful IPL franchises, suspended for 2 years.

name: Rajasthan Royals
description: Inaugural IPL champions, suspended for 2 years.

name: Kochi Tuskers Kerala
description: Terminated in 2011 after a single season.

name: Lucknow Super Giants
description: Joined the IPL in 2022 for ₹7,090 crore.

name: Gujarat Titans
description: Joined the IPL in 2022 and won the title in their debut season.

name: Sahara Group
description: Former owners of Pune Warriors India.
